title: Stan Bryant Dashboard Preview
impact: Cannot present to enterprise prospects without stakeholder sign-off

title: Demo Script Preparation
impact: First enterprise demo requires a rehearsed walkthrough script covering both CloudSync and Combo D stories

title: iPad Physical Test
impact: Browser DevTools simulation may miss touch/scroll issues on real device
evidence: Mobile responsive confirmed on physical iPad. Touch interactions, scroll behavior, and font rendering match browser simulation. Sidebar hamburger menu works correctly.

title: Lighthouse Performance Test
impact: Performance baseline needed before enterprise demos — slow load times undermine credibility

title: Security Audit Before Production Release
impact: Dashboard currently has no auth — acceptable for demo but not for client-specific data
